title: Index cohort set #1 — GDC open tier (TCGA + TARGET + CPTAC open)
context: The NCI Genomic Data Commons (GDC) hosts multiple large cancer genomics programs with both open and controlled access tiers. The open tier includes: TCGA (open-access somatic mutation calls and clinical summaries, not germline or BAMs which are controlled), TARGET (pediatric), and CPTAC (open proteogenomics). Each program is a distinct cohort identity (separate identityKeys) even though they share the GDC portal as a hostingLocation. Mixed-tier resources (TCGA has both open and controlled) must be indexed for the open portion only with governanceFlags: ['mixed-tier-open-portion-only']. Each record requires its own gate artifact and all Access/License/PII reviewer sign-offs. Depends on pilot-007 (end-to-end proven) and triage-009 (gate dispositions exist).
objective: Index the GDC open-tier cohort programs (TCGA open, TARGET, CPTAC open) as distinct canonical records with gate artifacts, fully cited fields, correct entryType and conditional aggregateCounts, identity dedup applied across portals (GDC/cBioPortal/Xena), and oncology-data reviewer sign-off on cancer-type coding and de-identification basis.
acceptanceCriteria: Each GDC open-tier cohort (TCGA open, TARGET open, CPTAC open — treated as distinct canonical cohorts with distinct identityKeys) has a gate-passed record with a committed gates/<cohort-id>.json artifact (PASS, access tier OPEN, license rights cited).

Mixed-tier resources (TCGA: open somatic data vs controlled germline/BAMs) have governanceFlags: ['mixed-tier-open-portion-only'] and the controlled portions are explicitly named as out of scope in the record.
Every record field carries a fieldProvenance citation (source URL, retrieval date, specific claim); completeness score ≥ 90/100 for each record.

identityKeys are set (primaryCustodian: NCI/GDC, programOrAccession, generationScope); hostingLocations[] records all portal appearances (GDC, cBioPortal, UCSC Xena where applicable) without creating duplicate records.
Cancer types coded with OncoTree primary codes and NCIt/ICD-O-3 cross-references; oncology-data reviewer signs off on coding and de-identification basis.
License snapshot recorded (committed text copy + SHA-256 + Wayback URL) for each cohort's terms.
Records pass schema validator and citation resolver; CI green; outputLicense CC-BY-4.0; DCO signed-off.
resources: TCGA open-access data description; TARGET project; CPTAC data portal
output: Committed catalog records (catalog/*.json) for GDC open-tier cohorts (TCGA open, TARGET, CPTAC open) with gate artifacts, fully cited, schema-valid, CI-green, licensed CC-BY-4.0.
